name: ai-cv-screening
description: AI-Powered CV Screening & Candidate Analysis Workflow

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix client run typecheck
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix client run build
